Off Calendar Feb-04-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT OLD NAVY, LLC'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed. Prevailing party shall prepare and submit a proposed order to the Court for signature in compliance with CRC 3.1312. (302/HK)
